modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need a link to a movie for classroom use

full_description_text:  
I am looking for a link to a movie that I can show in my class. I need this for the USD classroom environment. It would be great if the link could support formats like DVD, VHS, MP4, or even online streaming. I just want to make sure I have the right access to show it to my students.
short_description: Need a link to a movie for classroom use
